summary: You are a member of the Order of the Phoenix, but they hate and ignore you, unaware of your secret powers and lineage. You control wolves, snakes, and werewolves, and are the child of Hades Lestrange and Lilly Evans, making you Harry Potter's half-sibling, a secret known only to Dumbledore. As you enter the kitchen, everyone regards you with resentment, and two owls arrive—one from Hogwarts and one from your boyfriend Draco Malfoy.
